notes:
buông = to let go, to release something from your hand or control. It’s used for both physical things and more abstract stuff (like control or responsibility).

You use it as buông + object — often with tay (hand), dây (rope), chuột (computer mouse), điện thoại.  

Very common combo: buông tay (literally let go of someone’s hand, also implies giving up on a relationship).  
Stronger emotional version: buông bỏ = to let go mentally or emotionally.  

Opposite vibe: giữ / nắm (hold, keep).
exampleSentences: Anh không muốn buông những ký ức đẹp với em.
Nếu em mệt mỏi quá, hãy buông mọi thứ và nghỉ ngơi.
Đôi khi, chúng ta phải học cách buông để tìm hạnh phúc.

translation.en: I need to let go of all worries.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I don't want to let go of the beautiful memories with you.
If you are too tired, just let go of everything and rest.
Sometimes, we have to learn how to let go to find happiness.

definitions.vi: Thả ra hoặc buông bỏ một cái gì đó.
definitions.en: To release or let go of something.

translation.en: You can let go of unnecessary things.

content.sentence: Bạn có thể ___ những thứ không cần thiết.
